channel.title: itch.io Charity Bundles — Opportunities
channel.description: Auto-collected posts and jams related to charity/fundraisers on itch.io (fresh-only).

item.title: [JAMS] itch.io
item.description: [CHARITY] Humane Jam for Animals Hosted by KitKatarine Â· #JamForTheAnimals 2 Joined Overview Community Submissions open from 2026-04-13 05:00:00 to 2026-04-28 05:00:00 Starts in years months days hours minutes seconds Join jam Welcome to the very first Humane Jam for Animals - a
